{"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"analysis_summary","confidence":0.92,"matched_text":"Based on the 9 interviews regarding AR use in marketing, we can identify the following attributes, benefits, and consequences from a means-end theory perspective:","distilled_fact":"Based on 9 interviews regarding AR use in marketing, attributes, benefits, and consequences can be identified from a means-end theory perspective."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"analysis_result","confidence":0.91,"matched_text":"Attributes:

* User-friendly
* Detailed product information
* Interactive
* Privacy
* Cost
* Adoption","distilled_fact":"The attributes identified for AR use in marketing are user-friendly, detailed product information, interactive, privacy, cost, and adoption."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"analysis_result","confidence":0.91,"matched_text":"Benefits:

* Enjoyment
* Immersion
* High engagement
* Visual appeal
* Usability
* Easy to use
* Customization
* Real-time feedback","distilled_fact":"The benefits identified for AR use in marketing are enjoyment, immersion, high engagement, visual appeal, usability, easy to use, customization, and real-time feedback."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"analysis_result","confidence":0.91,"matched_text":"Consequences:

* Increased cost
* Privacy concerns
* Low adoption","distilled_fact":"The consequences identified for AR use in marketing are increased cost, privacy concerns, and low adoption."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"conceptual_model","confidence":0.88,"matched_text":"These attributes, benefits, and consequences are all linked through direct and indirect connections, forming a hierarchical value map (HVM) as shown in previous responses.","distilled_fact":"These attributes, benefits, and consequences are linked through direct and indirect connections and form a hierarchical value map (HVM)."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"interpretation","confidence":0.84,"matched_text":"The HVM provides a means to understand how each attribute, benefit, and consequence is connected and how they contribute to achieving the end goal of an improved experience for the customer.","distilled_fact":"The hierarchical value map (HVM) provides a means to understand how each attribute, benefit, and consequence is connected and how they contribute to achieving the end goal of an improved customer experience."}]}
